Saturn: Miners. farmers, dealers in leather. hide. ice, coal etc .•
Watch makers. monks. time keepers, underground workers. engineers

Rahu: Engineers. profession connected with electricity, working
under for~igners etc. If connected with Moon the nodes can ptoduce
a criminal. Rahu also signifies dealers In poison, drugs etc. The native
can also be a jailor. It Is also similar to Saturn.
Ketu: Ketu makes a native occultists. religious head. translator
etc. If connected with second house or Meroory the native will know
many languages. It also gives professions similar to that of Mars.
